prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (Red Top, 205hp stock) with a Tomei 264° camshaft kit, HKS GT-SS turbo manifold, and a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.86 A/R, 62 trim) for 350whp on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing a 300cc/min ID1000 injector upgrade and a Tomei Type-S exhaust manifold

Custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Fujitsubo GSpec muffler (single exit, 70mm tip) and a Tomei 4-2-1 header for optimized scavenging, paired with a Cusco 1.5-way LSD (2-way on decel) for the QR25DE-based AWD transfer case (retaining factory viscous coupling)

KW Variant 3 coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) with custom valving for the C25 chassis, reinforced with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, polybushings from SuperPro (P/N SPF1225K), and a Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar (P/N BSR70XZ) to eliminate body roll in high-G corners
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (P/N RB-SR2-001) modified for the Serena Rider’s C25 platform, with custom carbon fiber fender flares (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) and a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon (P/N CF-SR2-FSPLIT) for aggressive aero balance

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +22 front, 17x10 +30 rear) in Gunmetal, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear) with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from WedsSport for flush fitment

Full custom interior with Bride Zeta III seats (Sabelt 6-point harnesses), a custom roll cage from AutoPower (8-point, bolt-in, P/N AP-8B), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay from Varis (P/N V-CF-SR2-DASH) with a Defi BF gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) integrated into the A-pillar
